title: Problem
description: Top-level configuration for the simulation type and output.

oneOf.description: Perform an undamped or damped eigenfrequency analysis.
Perform a time-domain excitation response simulation.
Perform an electrostatic analysis to compute the capacitance matrix for a set of voltage terminals.
Perform a magnetostatic analysis to compute the inductance matrix for a set of current sources.

Verbose.description: Controls the level of log file printing.

Output.description: Directory path for saving postprocessing outputs.

Paraview.description: Set to `true` to output fields in [ParaView](https://www.paraview.org/) format.

GridFunction.description: Set to `true` to output fields in MFEM grid function format for visualization with [GLVis](https://glvis.org/).
